---
title: "Cloud Analytics"
toc: false
---

## Final Project: US Job Market - Analysing AI/Non-AI Job Postings
Final Project for the Cloud Analytics Course (AD688) at Boston University. This research was based on the US Job Market and the impact of AI/Machine learning. The project was completed in collaborationg with my classmates Feidhelm Joyce & Mahnoor Khalid. 

Please check out our website and research here: https://bdegouw.github.io/ad688-group1-job-market-analysis-f25/
